sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hash_operators (key UInt64, bucket_count UInt32, str_value String);
INSERT INTO test_hash_operators VALUES (1, 10, 'example'), (2, 20, 'TestString'), (3, 30, NULL), (18446744073709551615, 12, 'another example');
SELECT jumpConsistentHash((SELECT key FROM test_hash_operators WHERE str_value ILIKE '%Example%'), bucket_count) AS hash_value FROM test_hash_operators;
SELECT key, jumpConsistentHash(key, bucket_count) AS hash_value FROM test_hash_operators WHERE str_value ILIKE '%' || CAST(NULL AS String) || '%';
SELECT key, bucket_count, jumpConsistentHash(key, bucket_count) AS hash_value FROM test_hash_operators WHERE key ILIKE '1' AND key IN (SELECT key FROM test_hash_operators WHERE bucket_count > 5);
SELECT DISTINCT bucket_count, jumpConsistentHash(key, bucket_count) AS hash_value FROM test_hash_operators GROUP BY bucket_count HAVING jumpConsistentHash(key, bucket_count) ILIKE '1%';
SELECT key, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY jumpConsistentHash(key, bucket_count)) AS hash_count FROM test_hash_operators WHERE bucket_count IS NOT NULL;
SELECT jumpConsistentHash(key, bucket_count) AS hash_value FROM test_hash_operators WHERE ILIKE(str_value, 'test') AND (bucket_count > 0 OR str_value IS NULL);

SELECT key, jumpConsistentHash(key, bucket_count) AS hash_value FROM (SELECT key, bucket_count FROM test_hash_operators WHERE str_value ILIKE '%' || 'example' || '%') AS subquery WHERE key > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_hash_operators);
CREATE TABLE temp_hash_test AS SELECT jumpConsistentHash(key, bucket_count) AS hash_value FROM test_hash_operators WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL;
